meta.title: Electrician in SouthPark, Charlotte NC | Johnson's Electric
meta.description: Johnson's Electric provides licensed electrical services in SouthPark (28210, 28211). Panel upgrades, EV charging, smart home electrical & luxury home wiring. Call (704) 555-0199.
meta.og_description: Premium residential and commercial electrical services for SouthPark Charlotte. Panel upgrades, EV chargers, smart home systems. Licensed & insured.

hero.heading: Electrician in SouthPark
hero.description: SouthPark's luxury homes, upscale condos, and premier retail district deserve a professional electrical contractor. Johnson's Electric serves SouthPark with premium electrical services — from smart home automation to whole-panel upgrades — delivered with the care and expertise your home deserves.

about.label: Serving SouthPark
about.heading: Charlotte's Premier Electrical Contractor for SouthPark Homes
about.body1: SouthPark is one of Charlotte's most prestigious residential and commercial districts — home to the SouthPark Mall corridor, luxury homes in Beverly Woods and Barclay Downs, and a dense concentration of high-end retail and medical offices. Homeowners here expect precision, professionalism, and code-compliant work that adds lasting value.
about.body2: Johnson's Electric delivers exactly that. We specialize in high-end residential electrical services throughout SouthPark including smart home system integration, EV charging station installation, whole-home generator hookups, and panel upgrades designed to future-proof your home. Our licensed electricians treat your SouthPark property with the respect it deserves.

services.title: Smart Home Systems
services.description: Integrated smart lighting, automated switches, whole-home audio power, and smart panel installations for SouthPark's connected luxury homes.

services.title: EV Charger Installation
services.description: Level 2 home charging stations for Tesla, BMW, Mercedes, and all EV brands — installed properly with dedicated circuits in your SouthPark garage.

services.title: Panel Upgrades to 200A+
services.description: Upgrading electrical service to 200A, 320A, or 400A to support modern SouthPark homes with multiple EVs, home theaters, and smart home systems.

services.title: Whole-Home Generators
services.description: Standby generator installations and electrical hookups to keep your SouthPark home running during Duke Energy outages.

services.title: Luxury Lighting Design
services.description: Recessed lighting, under-cabinet lighting, landscape lighting, and decorative fixture installations for SouthPark's upscale interior and exterior spaces.

services.title: Commercial Electrical
services.description: Electrical services for SouthPark's medical offices, retail spaces, restaurants, and commercial properties along Sharon and Fairview roads.

faqs.question: Do you install Tesla Wall Connectors and other home EV chargers in SouthPark?
faqs.answer: Yes. We install all major home EV charging brands including Tesla Wall Connector, ChargePoint, Grizzl-E, and more. We handle the full installation including the dedicated 240V circuit and permit.

faqs.question: Can you integrate electrical with my smart home system (Control4, Lutron, etc.)?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We work with Control4, Lutron Caseta, Lutron RadioRA, and other smart home platforms to ensure your electrical infrastructure supports whole-home automation in your SouthPark residence.

faqs.question: My SouthPark home has a 100-amp panel — is that enough?
faqs.answer: For most modern SouthPark homes with EVs, smart systems, and high-end appliances, 100 amps is no longer sufficient. We recommend upgrading to at least 200 amps, and often 320A for homes with two EVs and large HVAC systems.

faqs.question: Do you service the medical offices and retail near SouthPark Mall?
faqs.answer: Yes. We handle commercial electrical for medical offices, retail suites, and restaurants throughout the SouthPark commercial corridor — including TI installation, panel work, and lighting retrofits.
